stat.title: Error-Assisted Runs
stat.subtitle: Runs scored with an error in the play.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Alex Freeland reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by shortstop Zach Neto. Max Muncy scores. Ryan Ward scores. Dalton Rushing scores. Alex Freeland to 2nd. Throwing error by shortstop Zach Neto.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Brewers challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: Brice Turang singles on a line drive to right fielder Jake Fraley. Gary Sánchez scores. Brandon Lockridge scores. Joey Ortiz scores. Brice Turang to 2nd. Brice Turang advances to 2nd, on a missed catch error by center fielder Cedric Mullins, assist to right fielder Jake Fraley.
